name: external_temperature
note: outside temperature; bit7 means negative Celsius

name: steering_panel_key
note: steering wheel and panel keys; status 0 release, >=1 press/repeat

name: air_conditioning
wire_frame: FD LL 0x03 L_TEMP R_TEMP FAN FLAGS CS16
note: climate popup; AC/dual/auto/air direction/defog/recirc bits in FLAGS

name: radar
note: front/rear parking sensor packed 2-bit zones

name: vehicle_doors
note: bit0 LF, bit1 RF, bit2 LR, bit3 RR, bit4 trunk, bit5 hood

name: vehicle_sunroof_candidate
source: local CAN log; TEYES support unknown
note: experimental 0x40 from C-CAN 0x541 DATA[7]&0x02; not decoded by public RZC Korea

name: ac_climate_status
note: show climate panel/status; public code comment references 2017 KX5

name: backlight
note: brightness/backlight level

name: protocol_version
note: canbox software/protocol version

name: reverse_local
note: reverse off/on used by programmer firmware

name: setting
note: settings command; not decoded in public manager

name: power
note: session start/end

name: volume_adjust
note: amplifier volume 0..35 after HU scaling

name: time_info
wire_frame: FD LL 0x06 MIN HOUR MODE CS16
note: time sync; example FD07062C06010040 = 06:44, mode 1

name: audio_balance
note: amplifier fade/balance

name: sound_effects
wire_frame: FD LL 0x08 BASS+10 MID+10 TREBLE+10 CS16
note: amplifier tone

name: host_status_radio
wire_frame: FD LL 0x09 02 BAND FREQ_H FREQ_L CS16
note: radio/FM/AM source status

name: host_status_usb
wire_frame: FD LL 0x09 16 TRACK_H TRACK_L HOUR MIN SEC CS16
note: USB media numeric status; photo shows seconds incrementing

name: host_status_other
note: other media source

name: host_status_aux
note: AUX source

name: host_status_off
note: media off

name: host_status_navigation
note: navigation source

name: host_status_bt_music
note: Bluetooth music source

name: host_status_bt_phone
note: Bluetooth phone call state

name: host_status_bt_connection
note: Bluetooth connected/disconnected

name: valid_unknown
note: valid checksum in user WR photo but not present in public RZC Korea protocol
